search.description: Searches {{platform}} log events and computes metrics over selected time windows.

tools.name: search_logs
tools.description: Search log events from selected dataset IDs and time range, with optional SQL-like filter.

execution.notes: Use for raw event retrieval in {{platform}}.

tools.name: compute_metrics
tools.description: Compute metrics such as AVG, MIN, MAX, COUNT, SUM over log data and group keys.

execution.notes: Useful when trend or aggregation is needed.

tools.name: get_timestamp_as_unix_epoch
tools.description: Convert a timestamp in {{time_format}} to unix epoch milliseconds.

execution.notes: Timezone is expected to be UTC.
Use when callers need current wall-clock reference.

datasets.description: Discovers datasets and key metadata available in {{platform}}.

tools.name: get_datasets
tools.description: Fetch all available dataset details including log IDs and tags.

execution.notes: Use first when selecting datasets for queries.

tools.name: get_datasets_by_name
tools.description: Fetch datasets matching an exact dataset name and collection name.

execution.notes: Resolves log IDs from human-readable names.

tools.name: get_keys
tools.description: List all keys present in a dataset identified by log ID.

execution.notes: Use before building filters to avoid invalid key names.

tools.name: get_all_datasets_keys
tools.description: List keys for every dataset, grouped by dataset ID.

execution.notes: Helps identify candidate datasets for a given key.

tools.name: get_key_values
tools.description: Fetch sample values for a key in a specific dataset.

execution.notes: Useful for building valid filter predicates.

statement_ids.description: Generates and manages statement IDs and deployment workflows.

execution.notes: Use when injecting statement IDs into log statements.

tools.name: deploy_statements
tools.description: Deploy a CSV mapping of statement IDs and log statements to {{platform}}.

execution.notes: Publishes statement metadata for downstream usage.

tools.name: inject_stmt_ids
tools.description: Prompt template explaining how to inject statement IDs in source files.

execution.notes: Reference file for statement IDs defaults to {{statement_ids_file}}.

tools.name: extract_stmt_ids
tools.description: Prompt template explaining how to extract statement IDs and write {{statement_ids_file}}.

execution.notes: Can override output filename when needed.

tools.name: update_stmt_ids
tools.description: Prompt template for updating injected IDs and refreshing {{statement_ids_file}}.
